description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the nerones/docker-laravel:latest Docker image. Set a MYSQL_DATABASE variable to mysql_database and cache the vendor/ directory. In a before_script run pecl install xdebug, docker-php-ext-enable xdebug, apt-get update && apt-get install poppler-utils -y, and composer install. Add a test job in the default test stage that executes vendor/bin/phpunit --configuration phpunit.xml --coverage-text --colors=never. No artifacts or special rules are defined.
